forecast-period.text: Clear. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Clear. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Mostly sunny morning. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Mostly clear. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly in the early afternoon then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then turning west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 25 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast at night. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 28.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
